[[Category:qq deprecated open]]<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->[[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Unsorted kk]][[Category:unsorted disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:qq deprecated open]]<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->[[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

[[Category:qq deprecated open]]<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Unsorted kk]][[Category:unsorted disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:qq deprecated open]]<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Unsorted disambiguation pages]] to [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

'''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics. == See Also! == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

[[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics. == See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

[[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics. == See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

[[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] <!--Kanbe (disambiguation)--> [[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics. == See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

'''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics. == See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].

=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=draft|12=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{citation needed|Kobe}}

<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->
<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=draft|12=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{citation needed|Kobe}}

<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->
<!--Kanbe (disambiguation)-->
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=draft|12=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=draft|12=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].

'''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].

''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=draft|12=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|12=draft|12=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=draft|12=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.

'''神戸'''（こうべ、こうど、ごうど、かんべ、かんど、じんこ、じんご、かのと）
== 概要 == * [[神戸 (民戸)]]（かんべ/じんこ） - [[古代]]から[[中世]]の[[日本]]において特定の[[神社]]の[[祭祀]]を維持するために神社に付属した民戸のこと。 * [[神戸 (小惑星)]]（こうべ） - 小惑星 * 地名（[[#地域・市町村の名称]]） ** 神戸（こうべ） - 自動車の[[日本のナンバープレート|ナンバープレート]]に表記される国土交通省運輸局記号。兵庫県神戸市[[東灘区]]に所在する「[[近畿運輸局]][[神戸運輸監理部]]兵庫陸運部」を示す。 * 人名他（[[#氏名・人名など]]）
== 地域・市町村の名称 == * [[神戸藩]]（かんべはん） - [[伊勢国]][[鈴鹿郡]]地域にあった藩。[[神戸氏]]、[[本多氏]]が治めた。 ** [[神戸城]]（かんべじょう） - 伊勢国[[神戸藩]]主の居城 * [[神戸]]（こうべ） - [[兵庫県]]の地名。付近一帯が[[生田神社]]の[[神戸 (民戸)|神戸]]だったことに由来する。 ** [[神戸市]] - 兵庫県に所在。（こうべし） ** [[神戸港]] * [[神戸町]] - [[岐阜県]][[安八郡]]に所在。（ごうどちょう） ** その他の神戸町（かつて存在した自治体及び町丁）については、[[神戸町 (曖昧さ回避)]]を参照。 * [[神戸中央郵便局]] - 兵庫県神戸市[[中央区 (神戸市)|中央区]]にある郵便局。 * [[神戸郵便局]] - 全国に4局ある<!--2008/5/1現在-->。読みはそれぞれ以下の通り。「かんべ」（千葉県館山市・愛知県田原市）、「ごうど」（岐阜県安八郡神戸町）、「かんど」（鳥取県鳥取市） * 神戸村については[[神戸村 (曖昧さ回避)]]を参照のこと。 * 駅の名称については[[神戸駅 (曖昧さ回避)]]を参照のこと。
=== 町丁・大字 === * [[群馬県]][[高崎市]][[神戸町 (高崎市)|神戸町]]（ごうど） * 群馬県[[みどり市]][[東村 (群馬県勢多郡)|東町]]神戸（ごうど） * [[埼玉県]][[川口市]][[神戸 (川口市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * 埼玉県[[東松山市]][[神戸 (東松山市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * 埼玉県[[羽生市]][[神戸 (羽生市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * [[東京都]][[西多摩郡]][[檜原村]][[神戸 (檜原村)|神戸]]（かのと） * [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[保土ケ谷区]][[神戸町 (横浜市)|神戸町]]（ごうど） * 神奈川県[[伊勢原市]][[神戸 (伊勢原市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * [[山梨県]][[甲斐市]][[神戸 (甲斐市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * [[長野県]][[北安曇郡]][[松川村]][[神戸 (松川村)|神戸]]（ごうど） * [[岐阜県]][[安八郡]][[神戸町]][[神戸 (神戸町)|神戸]]（ごうど） * [[静岡県]][[富士市]][[神戸 (富士市)|神戸]]（ごうど） * 静岡県[[榛原郡]][[吉田町]][[神戸 (吉田町)|神戸]]（かんど） * [[愛知県]][[弥富市]][[神戸 (弥富市)|神戸]]（かんど） * 愛知県[[名古屋市]][[熱田区]][[神戸町 (名古屋市)|神戸町]]（ごうど） * 愛知県[[大府市]]共和町神戸（ごうど） * 愛知県[[刈谷市]]泉田町神戸（ごうど） * 愛知県[[田原市]][[神戸町 (田原市)|神戸町]]（かんべ） * [[三重県]][[津市]][[神戸 (津市)|神戸]]（かんべ） * 三重県[[鈴鹿市]][[神戸 (鈴鹿市)|神戸]]（かんべ） - 伊勢国の有力豪族である神戸氏が拠点としていた。 * [[三重県]][[伊賀市]][[神戸 (伊賀市)|神戸]]（かんべ） * [[和歌山県]][[紀の川市]][[貴志川町神戸]]（こうど） * [[岡山県]][[津山市]][[神戸 (津山市)|神戸]]（じんご） * [[鳥取県]][[鳥取市]]神戸地区（かんど） * [[宮崎県]][[延岡市]][[神戸 (延岡市)|神戸町]]（こうべ）
=== スポーツチーム === * [[ヴィッセル神戸]] - [[日本プロサッカーリーグ|Jリーグ]]に所属する日本のプロサッカークラブ。 * [[デウソン神戸]] - [[日本フットサルリーグ|Fリーグ]]に所属する日本のフットサルクラブ。 * [[INAC神戸レオネッサ]] - [[日本女子サッカーリーグ|なでしこリーグ]]に所属する日本の女子プロサッカークラブ。 * [[神戸9クルーズ]] - [[関西独立リーグ (初代)|関西独立リーグ]]に所属した日本のプロ野球チーム（2009年〜2010年）。 * [[神戸サンズ]] - 関西独立リーグに所属した日本のプロ野球チーム（2011年〜2012年）。上の9クルーズを前身とする。 * [[エレコム神戸ファイニーズ]] - [[Xリーグ]]に所属する日本のアメリカンフットボールチーム。
== 氏名・人名など == * [[神戸氏]] - [[伊勢国]]の有力豪族。[[織田信長]]の息子、[[織田信孝]]も神戸と名乗っていた。
=== 日本の企業・ブランド（「神戸」を冠するもの）=== * [[神戸物産]] - [[兵庫県]][[加古郡]][[稲美町]]に本部を置く[[スーパーマーケット|食品スーパー]]。「[[業務スーパー]]」という名称で知られている。 * [[神戸屋]] - [[大阪市]][[東淀川区]]の[[パン]]メーカー。[[レストラン]]事業なども手がけている。 * [[神戸元町ドリア]] - [[サンマルクホールディングス|サンマルクグループ]]が展開するドリアレストラン。なおサンマルクホールディングスは[[岡山県]]が本拠である。 * [[神戸らんぷ亭]] - [[牛丼]]などを販売していた[[外食産業]]。2017年に後継の「銀座らんぷ亭」含め全店閉店。店舗は全て[[首都圏 (日本)|首都圏]]にあり、[[神戸市]]など[[京阪神]]地区には店舗はなかった。 * [[神戸製鋼所]] * [[神戸美人ぬか本舗]] - [[神戸市]]の[[化粧品]]メーカー。[[米ぬか化粧品]]・[[紫紺乃米]]が有名、創業115年を超える老舗。
== 関連項目 == * [[特別:Prefixindex/神戸|神戸で始まる記事の一覧]] * {{intitle|神戸}} * {{intitle|神戸 -神戸市}} * [[神戸川]] - [[東京都]][[西多摩郡]][[檜原村]]や[[神奈川県]][[鎌倉市]]など日本各地に流れている川。
{{Aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:こうへ}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:同名の地名]] [[Category:日本語の姓]]

'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|qq=draft}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|qq=draft}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|qq=draft}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|qq=draft}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|qq=draft}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

revision.text:
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District|ja|鈴鹿郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuka District|qq=}}, [[Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=}} and {{ill|Honda Clan|ja|本多氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honda Clan|qq=}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|ja|生田神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikuta Shrine|qq=}}. ''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Ampachi District|ja|安八郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ampachi District|qq=}}, [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|ja|中央区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūō-ku, Kobe|qq=}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|qq=}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|神戸 (曖昧さ回避)|version=100121179|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:All disambiguation pages]]
}}

''' [[Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|qq=}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[F-League]]. * [[INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

'''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Higashimatsuyama]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. === Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.

'''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
