revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|qq=}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[Wakayama]], [[Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|神戸 (曖昧さ回避)|version=100121179|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

revision.text:
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[:en:Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|qq=}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{Disambiguation}}

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[:en:Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|qq=|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|qq=|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|qq=|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[:en:Tottori|Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[:en:Tottori|Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[:en:Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[:en:Tottori|Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:神戸 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11589709]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11589709]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific [[:en:Shinto shrine|神社]] to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[:en:Tottori|Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{disambiguation}}

== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the [[:en:Suzuka District, Mie|Suzuka District]], [[:en:Ise Province|Ise Province]]. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and [[:en:Honda clan|Honda Clan]]. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of [[:en:Ikuta Shrine|Ikuta Shrine]]. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in [[:en:Anpachi District, Gifu|Ampachi District]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Kobe|Chūō-ku, Kobe]]. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * [[:en:Gunma Prefecture|Gunma Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[:en:Takasaki|Takasaki]]. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in [[:en:Yamanashi|Yamanashi]], [[:en:Nagano|Nagano]], [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Shizuoka|Shizuoka]], [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], [[:en:Mie|Mie]], [[:en:Wakayama|Wakayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], [[:en:Tottori|Tottori]], and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * [[:en:Vissel Kobe|Vissel Kobe]] - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the [[:en:F-League|F-League]]. * [[:en:INAC Kobe Leonessa|INAC Kobe Leonessa]] - A women's professional soccer team in the [[:en:Nadeshiko League|Nadeshiko League]]. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * [[:en:Elecom Kobe Finies|Elecom Kobe Finies]] - A professional [[:en:American football|American football]] team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]], son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * [[:en:Kobe Steel|Kobe Steel]]. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in [[:en:Nishitama District, Tokyo|西多摩郡]], Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|WD=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|WD=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|WD=Q336438|lt=Takasaki}}. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in {{ill|Yamanashi|en|Yamanashi|WD=Q394312|lt=Yamanashi}}, {{ill|Nagano|en|Nagano|WD=Q295551|lt=Nagano}}, {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka|en|Shizuoka|WD=Q18142847|lt=Shizuoka}}, [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], {{ill|Mie|en|Mie|WD=Q407422|lt=Mie}}, {{ill|Wakayama|en|Wakayama|WD=Q16909571|lt=Wakayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama}}, {{ill|Tottori|en|Tottori|WD=Q411992|lt=Tottori}}, and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * {{ill|Vissel Kobe|en|Vissel Kobe|WD=Q844271|lt=Vissel Kobe}} - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the {{ill|F-League|en|F-League|WD=Q5423617|lt=F-League}}. * {{ill|INAC Kobe Leonessa|en|INAC Kobe Leonessa|WD=Q2783054|lt=INAC Kobe Leonessa}} - A women's professional soccer team in the {{ill|Nadeshiko League|en|Nadeshiko League|WD=Q1628654|lt=Nadeshiko League}}. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * {{ill|Elecom Kobe Finies|en|Elecom Kobe Finies|WD=Q11291216|lt=Elecom Kobe Finies}} - A professional {{ill|American football|en|American football|WD=Q41323|lt=American football}} team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka}}, son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|WD=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in {{ill|Nishitama District, Tokyo|en|Nishitama District, Tokyo|WD=Q1048689|lt=西多摩郡}}, Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=神社}} to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|en|Suzuka District, Mie|WD=Q278828|lt=Suzuka District}}, {{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|WD=Q864166|lt=Ise Province}}. ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|WD=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|WD=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|WD=Q336438|lt=Takasaki}}. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in {{ill|Yamanashi|en|Yamanashi|WD=Q394312|lt=Yamanashi}}, {{ill|Nagano|en|Nagano|WD=Q295551|lt=Nagano}}, {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka|en|Shizuoka|WD=Q18142847|lt=Shizuoka}}, [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], {{ill|Mie|en|Mie|WD=Q407422|lt=Mie}}, {{ill|Wakayama|en|Wakayama|WD=Q16909571|lt=Wakayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama}}, {{ill|Tottori|en|Tottori|WD=Q411992|lt=Tottori}}, and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].

=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|WD=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=神社}} to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|en|Suzuka District, Mie|WD=Q278828|lt=Suzuka District}}, {{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|WD=Q864166|lt=Ise Province}}. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Kōbe Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|WD=Q2975272|lt=Honda Clan}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|en|Ikuta Shrine|WD=Q710086|lt=Ikuta Shrine}}. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Anpachi District, Gifu|en|Anpachi District, Gifu|WD=Q1204320|lt=Ampachi District}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}} (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|WD=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|WD=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|WD=Q336438|lt=Takasaki}}. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in {{ill|Yamanashi|en|Yamanashi|WD=Q394312|lt=Yamanashi}}, {{ill|Nagano|en|Nagano|WD=Q295551|lt=Nagano}}, {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka|en|Shizuoka|WD=Q18142847|lt=Shizuoka}}, [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], {{ill|Mie|en|Mie|WD=Q407422|lt=Mie}}, {{ill|Wakayama|en|Wakayama|WD=Q16909571|lt=Wakayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama}}, {{ill|Tottori|en|Tottori|WD=Q411992|lt=Tottori}}, and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * {{ill|Vissel Kobe|en|Vissel Kobe|WD=Q844271|lt=Vissel Kobe}} - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the {{ill|F-League|en|F-League|WD=Q5423617|lt=F-League}}. * {{ill|INAC Kobe Leonessa|en|INAC Kobe Leonessa|WD=Q2783054|lt=INAC Kobe Leonessa}} - A women's professional soccer team in the {{ill|Nadeshiko League|en|Nadeshiko League|WD=Q1628654|lt=Nadeshiko League}}. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * {{ill|Elecom Kobe Finies|en|Elecom Kobe Finies|WD=Q11291216|lt=Elecom Kobe Finies}} - A professional {{ill|American football|en|American football|WD=Q41323|lt=American football}} team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka}}, son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|WD=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in {{ill|Nishitama District, Tokyo|en|Nishitama District, Tokyo|WD=Q1048689|lt=西多摩郡}}, Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
{{disambiguation}}

'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=神社|1=Shinto shrine}} to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|en|Suzuka District, Mie|WD=Q278828|lt=Suzuka District|1=Suzuka District, Mie}}, {{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|WD=Q864166|lt=Ise Province|1=Ise Province}}. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Q11590167|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590167}} and {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|WD=Q2975272|lt=Honda Clan|1=Honda clan}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|en|Ikuta Shrine|WD=Q710086|lt=Ikuta Shrine|1=Ikuta Shrine}}. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Anpachi District, Gifu|en|Anpachi District, Gifu|WD=Q1204320|lt=Ampachi District|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|WD=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe|1=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|WD=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|WD=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in {{ill|Yamanashi|en|Yamanashi|WD=Q394312|lt=Yamanashi|1=Yamanashi}}, {{ill|Nagano|en|Nagano|WD=Q295551|lt=Nagano|1=Nagano}}, {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu|1=Gifu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka|en|Shizuoka|WD=Q18142847|lt=Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka}}, [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], {{ill|Mie|en|Mie|WD=Q407422|lt=Mie|1=Mie}}, {{ill|Wakayama|en|Wakayama|WD=Q16909571|lt=Wakayama|1=Wakayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Tottori|en|Tottori|WD=Q411992|lt=Tottori|1=Tottori}}, and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * {{ill|Vissel Kobe|en|Vissel Kobe|WD=Q844271|lt=Vissel Kobe|1=Vissel Kobe}} - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the {{ill|F-League|en|F-League|WD=Q5423617|lt=F-League|1=F-League}}. * {{ill|INAC Kobe Leonessa|en|INAC Kobe Leonessa|WD=Q2783054|lt=INAC Kobe Leonessa|1=INAC Kobe Leonessa}} - A women's professional soccer team in the {{ill|Nadeshiko League|en|Nadeshiko League|WD=Q1628654|lt=Nadeshiko League|1=Nadeshiko League}}. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * {{ill|Elecom Kobe Finies|en|Elecom Kobe Finies|WD=Q11291216|lt=Elecom Kobe Finies|1=Elecom Kobe Finies}} - A professional {{ill|American football|en|American football|WD=Q41323|lt=American football|1=American football}} team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka|1=Oda Nobutaka}}, son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}, also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|WD=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel|1=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in {{ill|Nishitama District, Tokyo|en|Nishitama District, Tokyo|WD=Q1048689|lt=西多摩郡|1=Nishitama District}}, Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.

=== Sports Teams === * {{ill|Vissel Kobe|en|Vissel Kobe|WD=Q844271|lt=Vissel Kobe|1=Vissel Kobe}} - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the {{ill|F-League|en|F-League|WD=Q5423617|lt=F-League|1=F-League}}. * {{ill|INAC Kobe Leonessa|en|INAC Kobe Leonessa|WD=Q2783054|lt=INAC Kobe Leonessa|1=INAC Kobe Leonessa}} - A women's professional soccer team in the {{ill|Nadeshiko League|en|Nadeshiko League|WD=Q1628654|lt=Nadeshiko League|1=Nadeshiko League}}. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * {{ill|Elecom Kobe Finies|en|Elecom Kobe Finies|WD=Q11291216|lt=Elecom Kobe Finies|1=Elecom Kobe Finies}} - A professional {{ill|American football|en|American football|WD=Q41323|lt=American football|1=American football}} team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].

Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|WD=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel|1=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.

'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=神社|1=Shinto shrine}} to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|en|Suzuka District, Mie|qid=Q278828|lt=Suzuka District|1=Suzuka District, Mie}}, {{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|qid=Q864166|lt=Ise Province|1=Ise Province}}. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Q11590167|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590167}} and {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|qid=Q2975272|lt=Honda Clan|1=Honda clan}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|en|Ikuta Shrine|qid=Q710086|lt=Ikuta Shrine|1=Ikuta Shrine}}. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Anpachi District, Gifu|en|Anpachi District, Gifu|qid=Q1204320|lt=Ampachi District|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|qid=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe|1=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].

revision.text:
'''Kōbe''' (こうべ, also read as こうど, ごうど, かんべ, かんど, じんこ, じんご, かのと)
== Overview == * [[Kōbe (Jinko)]] (かんべ/じんこ) - In [[:en:Ancient Japan|古代]] through the [[:en:Medieval period|中世]], a household associated with a specific {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=神社|1=Shinto shrine}} to support its rituals and operations. * [[Kōbe (asteroid)]] (こうべ) - An asteroid. * Place names ([[#Locations and municipalities]]). ''' Kōbe (こうべ) - Appears on [[:en:Japanese license plates|日本のナンバープレート]] as a designation for the {{ill|Kinki District Transport Bureau|ja|近畿運輸局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinki District Transport Bureau|1=Kinki District Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11638662}}'s Kobe Transport Management Office in [[Higashinada Ward]], Kobe City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * People and other uses ([[#People and other uses]]).
== Locations and Municipalities == * [[Kōbe Domain]] (かんべはん) - A domain in the {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|en|Suzuka District, Mie|qid=Q278828|lt=Suzuka District|1=Suzuka District, Mie}}, {{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|qid=Q864166|lt=Ise Province|1=Ise Province}}. Governed by the {{ill|Kōbe Clan|ja|神戸氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōbe Clan|1=Q11590167|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590167}} and {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|qid=Q2975272|lt=Honda Clan|1=Honda clan}}. ''' [[Kōbe Castle]] (かんべじょう) - The main castle of the Kōbe Domain in Ise Province. * [[:en:Kōbe|Kōbe]] (こうべ) - A place name in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, originating from the area being the shrine estate (Kōbe) of {{ill|Ikuta Shrine|en|Ikuta Shrine|qid=Q710086|lt=Ikuta Shrine|1=Ikuta Shrine}}. ''' [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]] - Located in Hyōgo Prefecture (こうべし). ''' [[:en:Kobe Port|Kobe Port]]. * [[Gōdo Town]] - Located in {{ill|Anpachi District, Gifu|en|Anpachi District, Gifu|qid=Q1204320|lt=Ampachi District|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (ごうどちょう). ''' For other Gōdo Towns (historical municipalities and neighborhoods), see [[Gōdo Town (disambiguation)|Gōdo Town (曖昧さ回避)]]. * [[Kobe Central Post Office]] - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Kobe|en|Chūō-ku, Kobe|qid=Q686802|lt=Chūō-ku, Kobe|1=Chūō-ku, Kobe}}. * [[Kobe Post Office]] - There are four in Japan (as of May 1, 2008), pronounced as follows: "Kanbe" (千葉県館山市, 愛知県田原市), "Gōdo" (岐阜県安八郡神戸町), and "Kando" (鳥取県鳥取市). * For {{ill|Kobe Village|ja|神戸村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe Village|1=kambemura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590158}} locations, refer to [[Kobe Village (disambiguation)|Kobe Village (曖昧さ回避)]]. * For station names, see [[:en:Kobe Station (disambiguation)|Kobe Station (曖昧さ回避)]].
=== Districts and Large Villages === * {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Takasaki)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}. '''* [[Tōmachi Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[Midori City]]. * {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Kawaguchi)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Kawaguchi City|Kawaguchi City]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Higashimatsuyama)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Higashimatsuyama|Higashimatsuyama]]. '''* [[Kōbe (Hanyū)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Hanyū|Hanyū]]. * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}: '''* [[Kōbe (Hinohara Village)|Kōbe]] (かのと), [[Hinohara Village]]. * {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}: '''* [[Kōbe Town (Yokohama)|Kōbe Town]] (ごうど), [[Hodogaya Ward]], Yokohama. '''* [[Kōbe (Isehara)|Kōbe]] (ごうど), [[:en:Isehara|Isehara]]. * Additional locations in {{ill|Yamanashi|en|Yamanashi|qid=Q394312|lt=Yamanashi|1=Yamanashi}}, {{ill|Nagano|en|Nagano|qid=Q295551|lt=Nagano|1=Nagano}}, {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|qid=Q45798|lt=Gifu|1=Gifu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka|en|Shizuoka|qid=Q18142847|lt=Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka}}, [[:en:Aichi|Aichi]], {{ill|Mie|en|Mie|qid=Q407422|lt=Mie|1=Mie}}, {{ill|Wakayama|en|Wakayama|qid=Q16909571|lt=Wakayama|1=Wakayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Tottori|en|Tottori|qid=Q411992|lt=Tottori|1=Tottori}}, and [[Miyazaki Prefectures]].
=== Sports Teams === * {{ill|Vissel Kobe|en|Vissel Kobe|qid=Q844271|lt=Vissel Kobe|1=Vissel Kobe}} - A professional soccer team in the [[:en:J-League|J-League]]. * [[Deuçon Kobe]] - A professional futsal team in the {{ill|F-League|en|F-League|qid=Q5423617|lt=F-League|1=F-League}}. * {{ill|INAC Kobe Leonessa|en|INAC Kobe Leonessa|qid=Q2783054|lt=INAC Kobe Leonessa|1=INAC Kobe Leonessa}} - A women's professional soccer team in the {{ill|Nadeshiko League|en|Nadeshiko League|qid=Q1628654|lt=Nadeshiko League|1=Nadeshiko League}}. * [[Kobe 9 Cruise]] - A professional baseball team in the [[Kansai Independent League (2009-2010)]]. * [[Kobe Suns]] - A successor baseball team in the Kansai Independent League (2011–2012). * {{ill|Elecom Kobe Finies|en|Elecom Kobe Finies|qid=Q11291216|lt=Elecom Kobe Finies|1=Elecom Kobe Finies}} - A professional {{ill|American football|en|American football|qid=Q41323|lt=American football|1=American football}} team in the [[:en:X-League|X-League]].
== People and Other Uses == * [[Kōbe Clan]] - A powerful family in Ise Province. {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|qid=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka|1=Oda Nobutaka}}, son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}, also adopted the name Kōbe.
=== Japanese Companies and Brands (with "Kobe" in the name) === * [[Kobe Bussan]] - A supermarket chain headquartered in [[Inami Town]], [[Kakogun]], Hyōgo Prefecture. * [[Kobeya Bakery]] - A bread manufacturer based in [[Higashiyodogawa Ward]], Osaka. Also operates restaurants. * [[Kobe Motomachi Doria]] - A restaurant chain under the [[Saint Marc Holdings]] group. * [[Kobe Lamptei]] - A former fast-food chain specializing in gyūdon. Closed in 2017. * {{ill|Kobe Steel|en|Kobe Steel|qid=Q1730802|lt=Kobe Steel|1=Kobe Steel}}. * [[Kobe Bijin Nuka Honpo]] - A cosmetics company in Kobe, known for rice bran cosmetics.
== See Also == * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Kobe|Articles starting with "Kobe"]] * {{intitle|Kobe}} * {{intitle|Kobe -Kobe City}} * [[Kobe River]] - Rivers named "Kobe" exist across Japan, including in {{ill|Nishitama District, Tokyo|en|Nishitama District, Tokyo|qid=Q1048689|lt=西多摩郡|1=Nishitama District}}, Tokyo, and [[:en:Kamakura City|Kamakura City]], Kanagawa.
